positive: A sophisticated, stylized illustration of a majestic astronaut floating in deep space, surrounded by vibrant, geometric nebula clouds and minimalist cosmic fauna. The astronaut should be depicted with a clean, futuristic suit and a serene, contemplative pose. Use strong contrasting colors of deep indigo, electric cyan, and brilliant gold accents. The style should be a blend of modern vector art and ethereal bioluminescence, focusing on clean lines and bold shapes suitable for textile printing. Composition must be perfectly centered, allowing for high contrast silhouettes against the nebula background. Studio lighting effect, highly detailed, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, artifacts, low resolution, watermark, text, signatures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, distorted, messy, grain, logo, trademark, celebrity, copyrighted, realistic photograph, poor composition
